summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. The hydrated preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive items and no shared canonical; every hydrated PR is a standalone open PR candidate, so no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned. Five job-listed refs were not present in the compacted preflight item matrix, so those exact decisions need fresh hydration before classification.
